title: В какие часы лучше работать? Уникальный метод расчета
description:

Планируйте важные задачи на периоды повышения температуры, а отдых - на спады. Учитывайте циркадные ритмы и распределяйте задачи в течение дня. title: My 2024 Cozy Desk Setup | Standing Desk, Ergonomic Chair, 5K Monitor, Desk Accessories, Zen & Earthy
description:
Welcome to my 2024 desk setup tour, where I have been finding my zen, focusing on my daily rituals, and stressing less about goals.

Here is where I channel my creativity, and find inspiration. A clean space, leads to a clean mind.

Flow is positive. Flow is when you are focusing on something at hand, with zero distractions. Where the ideas & creativity flow naturally, and things are not stagnant.

So, what gives you flow? And what allows you to enter your flow?

I hope this video speaks to you, and inspires you to find your flow and reset your space.

title: Day in the Life with iPhone 16 Pro Max | iOS 18 Setup, Camera Tips & MagSafe Must-Haves
description: Welcome to my channel! This is a Day In The Life with the iPhone 16 Pro Max in Desert Titanium. I really enjoyed setting up my iPhone 16 Pro Max with the new customization features in iOS 18. I share many iOS 18 shortcuts & tips, new iPhone MagSafe cases & neat accessories, as well as testing out the new Camera Control & camera.
